gt_sql: SELECT T3.forename, T3.surname, T3.driverRef FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND T2.rank = 1 AND T1.year = 2007
pred_sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.driverRef
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
  AND r.year = 2007
  AND res.position = 1;
question: Which driver ranked the first in the Canadian Grand Prix in 2007? Please give his reference name.
